# Support

## Where to ask questions

- **Usage questions / integration help:** GitHub Discussions
- **Reproducible defects:** GitHub Issues (use bug report template)
- **Feature ideas:** GitHub Issues (feature request template)
- **Documentation feedback:** GitHub Issues (documentation template)

## Security incidents

Do not report security issues publicly.

Send details to: **security@agro-lidar.com**

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for disclosure policy and expected response times.

## Safety-critical incidents

Use the safety issue template and provide:

- conditions and environment
- affected classes
- mitigation actions taken
- artifacts (frame IDs/log snippets) when available
